description: A search text input field used within the site search form, with placeholder, autocomplete, and accessibility attributes.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Default search input with placeholder text

stories.name: WithValue
stories.description: Search input with a pre-filled value

stories.name: CustomPlaceholder
stories.description: Search input with a custom placeholder for a specific search context

notes: The input always has type='search', autocomplete='off', aria-autocomplete='list', and aria-haspopup='true' — these should be hardcoded. The id 'site-search-box' is consistently used and corresponds to the label's for attribute in the parent form. The required attribute appears in all samples and should default to true. The onChange handler enables controlled usage.
htmlExamples: <input id="site-search-box" class="site-search-input" type="search" name="query" autocomplete="off" placeholder="Search our site" aria-label="Search our site" aria-autocomplete="list" aria-haspopup="true" required="">
